name: D2R Loot Filter — Intense
description: Hides trash drops (non-rejuv potions, ammo, throwing potions) by renaming their ground labels to a tiny dot. Designed to stack cleanly after ChrisTitusTech/d2r-loot-filter in D2RMM load order, but works standalone too. Display strings only — does not affect actual drops.
author: voc0der

children.name: 100% Rejuv Only
children.description: Hide every potion that is not a Full Rejuvenation Potion: small rejuvs, all healing potions, all mana potions, and thawing/antidote/stamina potions.

children.name: Hide Throwing Potions
children.description: Hide all gas and oil throwing potions.

children.name: Hide Unpopular Bases
children.description: Hide 40 junk elite weapon bases nobody uses (bad axes, off-meta swords, non-Amazon javelins, all elite crossbows...). Merc bases and popular runeword/unique bases stay visible. WARNING: hides ALL rarities of these bases, including their (junk-tier) unique and set drops — ground labels are one string per base.

children.name: Hidden Item Style
children.description: Hidden items are renamed to a tiny colored dot instead of an empty string, because an empty name renders as an ugly empty highlight box.
